scenarios.title: submits web form text input and receives confirmation @positive
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to the web form page, fill the text input with 'Selenium', click the submit button, and verify the confirmation message appears.
expectedAssertions: page title equals 'Web form' after navigation
element #message displays text 'Received!' after form submission

locatorTable.notes: name='my-text' implies a labeled text field; label text assumed from web-form conventions — DOM verification required. Fallback: page.locator('[name="my-text"]'). See pin 1.
Generic tag selector gives no accessible-name evidence; 'Submit' assumed from form semantics only. See pin 2.
Direct ID mapping. If element carries role='status' or role='alert', upgrade to getByRole for quality score improvement (Q3).

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q1 unresolved: label text not confirmed for name='my-text' — assumed 'Text input' from web-form convention.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect web-form.html source for the visible label text above the text input and supply exact regex; or request data-testid='text-input' be added to the element.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q2 unresolved: submit button accessible name not confirmed — 'Submit' assumed from form semantics.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect the <button> element in web-form.html for its visible text content and replace /submit/i with the correct regex; or use page.locator('button[type="submit"]') as a structural fallback.
